specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services — from boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater work, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation — all designed to give boat owners peace of mind on the water.

At Ben's Boatworks, we take a hands-on approach to every job. Whether we're conducting a thorough pre-purchase boat survey, performing underwater hull inspections and cleaning, diagnosing a marine air conditioning system, or troubleshooting a tricky sanitation or through-hull plumbing issue, we bring the same level of care and attention to detail to every vessel that comes our way. We understand that your boat represents a significant investment, and we treat it that way.

We serve boat owners throughout South Florida and the surrounding region, working across a wide range of vessel types and sizes. Our commitment is straightforward — show up, do the work right, and make sure you're confident in the condition and performance of your boat before you head back out. Whether you're docked locally or need a mobile marine technician to come to you within our 60-mile service area, Ben's Boatworks is here to help.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing in South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey covers a thorough examination of your vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and safety equipment — giving buyers, sellers, and insurers a clear picture of a boat's true condition. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey, insurance survey, or condition-and-value report, having an experienced marine surveyor on your side can save you from costly surprises down the line.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow for hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and debris removal without the time and expense of hauling out. Regular underwater maintenance keeps marine growth and corrosion from taking hold, protecting your running gear and hull from damage that can go undetected above the waterline.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge of refrigerant handling, raw water cooling circuits, and onboard electrical systems that differ significantly from residential HVAC. We diagnose and service marine AC units, including seacock and strainer maintenance, refrigerant recharging, and blower and pump repairs, to keep your cabin comfortable in any conditions.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Marine plumbing and sanitation systems include everything from through-hull fittings and seacocks to holding tanks, marine heads, and macerator pumps — all of which require proper installation and routine maintenance to stay compliant and leak-free. We troubleshoot and repair onboard sanitation systems to keep your vessel safe, odor-free, and in line with marine environmental regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey to assess vessel condition before buying
Insurance marine inspection for condition and value documentation
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine AC system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal servicing
Holding tank and marine head repair or full replacement
Through-hull fitting and seacock inspection and replacement
Propeller and running gear inspection via underwater dive service
